mano_cua.result_summary: Bug 复现。移动端布局（375px）下，点击 Conversations 面板中的对话标题（单击或双击）均会关闭面板并选中对话，不会进入标题编辑状态。相比之下，桌面端同一操作可正常进入编辑模式（标题变为可编辑输入框）。测试过程：1) DevTools 设置 375px 视口；2) 发送消息创建对话；3) 桌面端双击标题→成功编辑为 'Test Conversation'；4) 移动端单击/双击标题→面板关闭，无编辑状态。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Double-clicking on the conversation title in mobile mode closed the conversations panel and returned to the main chat view. In mobile mode, clicking/double-clicking on conversation title closes the panel without entering edit mode, while in desktop mode the same action makes the title editable.
